subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou hadst written was perused. The beloved of God must be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید احبای الهی باید رحمت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
